title: Software Engineer - Productivity Engineering
description:
LinkedIn was built to help professionals achieve more in their careers, and every day millions of people use our products to make connections, discover opportunities and gain insights. Our global reach means we get to make a direct impact on the world’s workforce in ways no other company can. We’re much more than a digital resume – we transform lives through innovative products and technology.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 At LinkedIn, our approach to flexible work is centered on trust and optimized for culture, connection, clarity, and the evolving needs of our business. The work location of this role is hybrid, meaning it will be performed both from home and from a LinkedIn office on select days, as determined by the business needs of the team.
   

  





 We are looking for a Software Engineer to join the Productivity Engineering team in Bangalore, where our mission is to transform how employees work by replacing manual, fragmented support experiences with intelligent, AI\\-native experiences. You will build end\\-to\\-end systems that put AI agents at the center of the employee productivity loop — from request intake to resolution — dramatically reducing toil and enabling people to focus on high\\-leverage work.
   

  





**Responsibilities**



* Build AI agentic systems end\\-to\\-end — design, implement, and ship services that orchestrate LLM\\-powered agents to handle employee support workflows autonomously.
* Own the full development lifecycle — from requirements and architecture through implementation, testing, deployment, and monitoring, following AI\\-native SDLC practices.
* Develop agent tooling and integrations — build the tools and connectors agents use to interact with internal systems (ticketing, knowledge bases, identity, SaaS platforms) in a safe, auditable way.
* Instrument for observability — define evals, trace agent reasoning chains, and build feedback loops so system quality is measurable and continuously improvable.
* Iterate rapidly with data — use production signals, user feedback, and eval frameworks to drive model prompt tuning, retrieval improvements, and workflow refinements.
* Collaborate cross\\-functionally — partner with product, operations, and platform teams to translate employee pain points into automated solutions with measurable impact.
* Write high\\-quality, maintainable code — enforce engineering standards through code reviews, testing, and documentation that enables the team to move fast with confidence.


**Qualifications**

**Basic qualifications**



* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 2\\+ years of software engineering experience building, testing, and shipping production\\-grade backend systems.
* Professional experience programming in Python or Java.
   

  




	+ If Python: Experience with FastAPI, Flask, or Django, including experience with async/await and type hinting.
	+ If Java: Experience with Spring Boot or equivalent frameworks including concurrency and JVM fundamentals.
* Hands\\-on experience developing and maintaining REST or gRPC APIs, with a focus on building scalable, maintainable service logic and background integrating with enterprise systems via APIs or webhooks.
* Experience building systems end\\-to\\-end, including data modeling (SQL/NoSQL), integration with external services, deployment pipelines, and basic production monitoring.
* Experience delivering features by breaking down technical requirements into actionable code.



**Preferred qualifications**



* Experience building or working with AI agent frameworks.
* Familiarity with AI\\-native SDLC practices: prompt versioning, eval\\-driven development, and agent observability.
* Exposure to workflow orchestration tools (e.g., Temporal, Airflow) for managing multi\\-step agentic pipelines.



**Suggested skills**



* Python or Java
* REST/gRPC API development
* Databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL; NoSQL)
* Messaging systems (Kafka/SQS/RabbitMQ)
* LLMs and vector databases



**Technologies you’ll work with**



* Language: Python or Java, with willingness to work across the stack.
* AI/ML: LLM APIs (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic), vector databases (e.g., Pinecone, Weaviate, Milvus), and orchestration patterns (chains, agents, tool\\-calling).
* Backend \\& API: FastAPI/Flask (Python) or Spring Boot/Quarkus (Java); gRPC and RESTful API design.
* Messaging \\& async: Distributed systems using message queues (Kafka, SQS, or RabbitMQ) to handle long\\-running agentic tasks.
* Data: Relational databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL), object storage (S3\\), and data modeling for RAG (Retrieval\\-Augmented Generation).


**Additional Information**

**India Disability Policy**




 LinkedIn is an equal employment opportunity employer offering opportunities to all job seekers, including individuals with disabilities. For more information on our equal opportunity policy, please visit https://legal.linkedin.com/content/dam/legal/Policy\\_India\\_EqualOppPWD\\_9\\-12\\-2023\\.pdf
   

  




  


**Global Data Privacy Notice for Job Candidates ​**




 Please follow this link to access the document that provides transparency around the way in which LinkedIn handles personal data of employees and job applicants: https://legal.linkedin.com/candidate\\-portal.

title: Senior Software Engineer - Productivity Engineering
description:
LinkedIn was built to help professionals achieve more in their careers, and every day millions of people use our products to make connections, discover opportunities and gain insights. Our global reach means we get to make a direct impact on the world’s workforce in ways no other company can. We’re much more than a digital resume – we transform lives through innovative products and technology.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 At LinkedIn, our approach to flexible work is centered on trust and optimized for culture, connection, clarity, and the evolving needs of our business. The work location of this role is hybrid, meaning it will be performed both from home and from a LinkedIn office on select days, as determined by the business needs of the team.
   

  





 We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join the Productivity Engineering team in Bangalore, where our mission is to transform how employees work by replacing manual, fragmented support experiences with intelligent, AI\\-native automation. You will lead the design and delivery of end\\-to\\-end agentic systems that put AI at the center of the employee productivity loop — and raise the technical bar for how the team builds, evaluates, and operates these systems at scale.
   

  





 This is a high\\-ownership, high\\-scope role. Beyond shipping systems, you will own the problem space: independently investigating employee pain points, deriving solution contexts, and translating ambiguous signals into engineering initiatives with clear technical direction and measurable outcomes. You will set standards for how the team approaches AI\\-native development and mentor others to build with the same rigor.
   

  

  

  

**Responsibilities:**




 · Own problem statements end\\-to\\-end — proactively investigate employee productivity pain points, synthesize signals from data, stakeholders, and operations, and derive the solution context that frames what we build and why.
   

  





 · Drive solution architecture — translate well\\-understood problem contexts into technical designs for agentic systems, making principled tradeoffs across reliability, latency, safety, and maintainability.
   

  





 · Architect and deliver AI agentic systems — lead the end\\-to\\-end design and delivery of Python\\-based services that orchestrate LLM\\-powered agents across complex, multi\\-step employee support workflows.
   

  





 · Set the technical direction for AI\\-native engineering — define how the team approaches eval\\-driven development, agent observability, prompt lifecycle management, and safe autonomous action at scale.
   

  





 · Drive system reliability and quality — own the standards for testing, tracing, and monitoring agentic pipelines so production systems are debuggable, auditable, and continuously improvable.
   

  





 · Expand the agent capability surface — design the tool ecosystem that agents use to interact with internal platforms (ticketing, identity, knowledge, SaaS), balancing expressiveness with guardrails.
   

  





 · Mentor and grow the team — provide technical guidance through code reviews, design reviews, and pair programming; raise the floor for how IC2s approach AI systems work.
   

  





 · Influence cross\\-functional roadmap — partner with product, operations, and platform teams to identify the highest\\-leverage automation opportunities and shape the engineering roadmap around them.
   

  

  

  




**Qualifications**

**Basic Qualifications**




 · Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
   

  





 · 5–8 years of software engineering experience building, architecting, and operating large\\-scale production backend systems.
   

  





 · Language \\& Stack Mastery: Deep expertise in either Python/Java, with a command of modern ecosystems:
   

  




* If Python: Proficiency in FastAPI / Asyncio, type hinting (Pydantic), and managing high\\-concurrency event loops.
* If Java: Proficiency in Spring Boot / Quarkus, Reactive programming (Project Reactor/Vert.x), and JVM performance tuning.



 · API \\& Distributed Systems: Proven experience designing and implementing high\\-performance REST and gRPC APIs, with understanding of distributed system patterns (e.g., circuit breakers, service discovery, and eventual consistency).
   

  





 · Full Ownership: A track record of owning and delivering complex systems end\\-to\\-end—from initial scoping and architectural design to implementation, automated testing, and production operations (SRE mindset).
   

  





 · Strategic Problem Solving: Demonstrated ability to independently identify and frame engineering problems. You should be able to navigate ambiguous or incomplete signals to define technical roadmaps rather than just executing against a pre\\-defined ticket.
   

  





 · AI Implementation: Hands\\-on experience integrating LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, or open\\-source models) into production workflows, including prompt engineering and managing the non\\-deterministic nature of AI outputs.
   

  





  

  

**Preferred Qualifications:**




 · Experience designing or leading the development of AI agent systems — tool use, multi\\-agent coordination, memory, and autonomous task execution.
   

  





 · Command of AI\\-native SDLC practices: eval\\-driven development, prompt versioning and regression testing, agent observability/tracing.
   

  





 · Experience with workflow orchestration and durable execution frameworks (e.g., Temporal, Airflow) for reliable multi\\-step agentic pipelines.
   

  





 · Track record of establishing engineering standards — testing patterns, observability practices, deployment conventions — that a team adopts and builds on.
   

  





 · Experience integrating deeply with enterprise SaaS platforms (Slack, Jira, Confluence, ServiceNow, etc.) and designing resilient integration layers.
   

  





  

  

**Technologies You'll Work With:**




 · Proficiency in Python or Java (Open to either, with a willingness to work across the stack).
   

  





 · Experience with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.), Vector Databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, Milvus), and Orchestration Patterns (Chains, Agents, Tool\\-calling).
   

  

  

  

 · Building high\\-performance services using FastAPI/Flask (Python) or Spring Boot/Quarkus (Java); experience with gRPC and RESTful API design.
   

  





 · Distributed systems experience using Message Queues (Kafka, SQS, or RabbitMQ) to handle long\\-running agentic tasks.
   

  





 · Relational databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL), Object Storage (S3\\), and understanding of data modeling for RAG (Retrieval\\-Augmented Generation).
   

  

  

  




**Additional Information**

**India Disability Policy**

title: Software Developer
description:
**About Groww**
 We are a passionate group of people focused on making financial services accessible to every Indian through a multi\\-product platform. Each day, we help millions of customers take charge of their financial journey. Customer obsession is in our DNA. Every product, every design, every algorithm down to the tiniest detail is executed keeping the customers’ needs and convenience in mind. Our people are our greatest strength. Everyone at Groww is driven by ownership, customer\\-centricity, integrity and the passion to constantly challenge the status quo.
   

  

 Are you as passionate about defying conventions and creating something extraordinary as we are? Let’s chat.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a talented Software Development Engineer to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining scalable, high\\-quality microservices that power Groww’s innovative financial platform. You will work closely with cross\\-functional teams including product managers, architects, and other stakeholders to deliver features that enhance user experience and operational efficiency. The ideal candidate will have a strong foundation in software engineering principles, a passion for building reliable systems, and the ability to troubleshoot and resolve production issues swiftly. This role offers an exciting opportunity to contribute to a rapidly growing organization committed to transforming financial services in India.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science Engineering or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 3\\-5 years of experience in developing scalable microservices, preferably using RESTful or SOAP APIs.
* Proficiency in designing low\\-level and high\\-level architecture diagrams (LLD/HLD) and implementing solutions based on them.
* Strong understanding of design patterns and best practices in software development.
* Excellent problem\\-solving skills with a focus on efficient and effective solutions.
* Deep knowledge of data structures, algorithms, and their complexities.
* Hands\\-on experience with Java and Spring Boot framework, with the ability to translate design into high\\-quality code fluently.
* Good understanding of cloud platforms such as GCP, AWS, or similar infrastructure.
* Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast\\-paced environment, demonstrating strong technical aptitude and a quick learning curve.


**Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, and maintain robust microservices architectures that are scalable, reliable, and secure.
* Take end\\-to\\-end ownership of features from design, coding, testing, deployment, to maintenance.
* Ensure high code quality through rigorous testing, code reviews, and adherence to best practices.
* Collaborate with product managers, architects, and other stakeholders to define requirements and deliver solutions effectively.
* Participate in sprint planning, stand\\-ups, and retrospectives, contributing to continuous improvement of development processes.
* Proactively troubleshoot and resolve production issues, minimizing downtime and impact on users.
* Mentor junior team members, sharing knowledge and fostering a collaborative team environment.
* Stay updated with emerging technologies and industry trends to incorporate innovative solutions into the platform.


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary packages aligned with industry standards.
* Comprehensive health insurance for employees and their dependents.
* Flexible working hours and remote work options to promote work\\-life balance.
* Opportunities for professional growth and skill development through training and workshops.
* Inclusive and collaborative work environment that values diversity and innovation.
* Performance\\-based bonuses and stock options for eligible employees.
* Generous leave policies and wellness programs to support overall well\\-being.


 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Groww is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that a diverse workforce enhances our ability to innovate and serve our customers effectively. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to any of these factors.

title: Full Stack Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 Procure is a forward\\-thinking technology company dedicated to developing innovative solutions that streamline procurement processes for businesses worldwide. With a focus on leveraging cutting\\-edge technologies, we aim to enhance efficiency, transparency, and scalability for our clients. Our team is composed of passionate professionals committed to building impactful products that transform traditional procurement practices. Recognized for our collaborative culture and commitment to excellence, Procure continuously invests in research and development to stay ahead of industry trends and deliver exceptional value to our customers.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Senior Full Stack MERN Engineer to join our dynamic team on a long\\-term basis. This role is ideal for a high\\-performer who thrives in a challenging environment and possesses a deep understanding of scalable web architectures. As a key contributor, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining complex micro\\-service architectures that power our large\\-scale web applications. Your expertise will directly influence the robustness and performance of our platform, ensuring seamless user experiences and efficient data management. You will collaborate closely with our veteran distributed team, primarily during IST working hours, participating in daily stand\\-ups, architecture reviews, and knowledge\\-sharing sessions. Your innovative mindset and technical prowess will be instrumental in integrating AI\\-driven features, optimizing CI/CD pipelines, and ensuring adherence to best practices throughout the software development lifecycle.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess over nine years of proven experience as a MERN Stack engineer, demonstrating a strong track record of building scalable and maintainable web applications. Expertise in ReactJS, TypeScript, and Node.js frameworks such as Koa and Express is essential. You should have a comprehensive understanding of architectural patterns suitable for large applications, including experience with GraphQL and REST APIs. Proficiency in managing complex data storage layers using MySQL/RDS and MongoDB is required. You must be a high performer capable of writing modular, reusable, and thoroughly tested code, with a solid grasp of version control workflows using GitHub. Familiarity with AI tools and enthusiasm for developing AI\\-driven features will be highly valued. Additionally, you should be trustworthy, self\\-driven, and comfortable working remotely within a distributed team based in India. Candidates must be prepared for a rigorous interview process, including an on\\-camera technical assessment, with a top 1\\.5% pass rate.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Your responsibilities will include designing and maintaining scalable micro\\-service architectures tailored for large web applications built on the MERN stack. You will develop high\\-quality, optimized front\\-end code using ReactJS and back\\-end logic utilizing TypeScript, Koa, and Express. Managing complex storage solutions with MySQL and MongoDB to ensure data integrity and performance is crucial. Collaborating effectively with the team during IST hours, participating in daily stand\\-ups, architecture reviews, and knowledge sharing sessions will be essential. You will follow SDLC best practices by writing clean, well\\-documented code, conducting thorough code reviews, and developing unit tests with Jest to guarantee reliability. Your role will also involve leveraging AI tools to enhance productivity and integrate AI\\-driven features into our products. Streamlining CI/CD pipelines and automating deployment processes will be part of your responsibilities, along with managing tasks and infrastructure within JIRA and AWS environments. Your proactive approach and technical expertise will help us deliver robust, scalable solutions that align with our strategic goals.
   

  

**Benefits**
 At Procure, we offer a competitive compensation package ranging from $2,800 to $3,800 USD per month, based on skills, experience, and interview performance. As a fully remote team, you will enjoy the flexibility of working from anywhere within India, with the opportunity to collaborate with a talented and driven global team. We provide a supportive environment that encourages continuous learning and professional growth. Our benefits include flexible working hours aligned with IST, access to cutting\\-edge tools and technologies, and opportunities to contribute to innovative projects that have a tangible impact on procurement processes worldwide. We also emphasize a healthy work\\-life balance, fostering a culture of trust, transparency, and mutual respect. Joining Procure means becoming part of a high\\-performance team committed to excellence and innovation in the tech industry.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Procure is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. Our hiring practices are designed to ensure fairness and equal opportunity for all qualified candidates. We believe that a diverse team fosters innovation and drives our success, and we encourage individuals from all backgrounds to apply and join our growing organization.

**About ValGenesis**

ValGenesis suite of products are used by 30 of the top 50 global pharmaceutical and biotech companies to achieve digital transformation, total compliance and manufacturing excellence/intelligence across their product lifecycle.

**Requirements**

**We’re on a Mission**
 In 2005, we disrupted the life sciences industry by introducing the world’s first digital validation lifecycle management system. ValGenesis VLMS® revolutionized compliance\\-based corporate validation activities and has remained the industry standard.

**The Team You’ll Join**
 Our customers’ success is our success. We keep the customer experience centered in our decisions, from product to marketing to sales to services to support. Life sciences companies exist to improve humanity’s quality of life, and we honor that mission.
   

  

 We work together. We communicate openly, support each other without reservation, and never hesitate to wear multiple hats to get the job done.
   

  

 We think big. Innovation is the heart of ValGenesis. That spirit drives product development as well as personal growth. We never stop aiming upward.
   

  

 We’re in it to win it. We’re on a path to becoming the number one intelligent validation platform in the market, and we won’t settle for anything less than being a market leader.
   

  

**How We Work**
 Our Chennai, Hyderabad and Bangalore offices are onsite, 5 days per week. We believe that in\\-person interaction and collaboration fosters creativity, and a sense of community, and is critical to our future success as a company.
   

  

 ValGenesis is an equal\\-opportunity employer that makes employment decisions on the basis of merit. Our goal is to have the best\\-qualified people in every job. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or any other characteristics protected by local law.

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled Software Engineer to join Qualcomm’s dynamic Generative AI team. As a key contributor, you will be responsible for designing, implementing, and deploying scalable, high\\-performance software stacks that facilitate the execution of large language models (LLMs), vision models (LVMs), and other generative AI frameworks. Your expertise will directly impact the performance and efficiency of Qualcomm’s AI runtime SDKs, empowering developers to deploy state\\-of\\-the\\-art AI models at near\\-GPU speeds with minimal power consumption. With a strong emphasis on cutting\\-edge technologies and industry best practices, NR Consulting strives to deliver exceptional value through customized solutions that enhance operational efficiency, scalability, and security. Our team of experienced professionals is committed to staying at the forefront of technological advancements to meet the evolving needs of our clients. We foster a collaborative and inclusive work environment that promotes continuous learning, professional growth, and excellence in service delivery.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Network Engineer specializing in SONiC (Software for Open Networking in the Cloud) to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will possess a strong background in network infrastructure, with hands\\-on experience in programmatic network configuration, automation, and scripting. This role involves supporting and implementing advanced networking solutions in data center environments, ensuring optimal performance, security, and scalability. The Network Engineer will work closely with cross\\-functional teams to design, deploy, and troubleshoot complex network architectures, leveraging technologies such as gNMI, YANG, and FRR routing protocols. This is a remote position based out of Noida, with shift timings from 7 pm to 3 am, catering to our global clientele.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should possess a minimum of 4\\+ years of relevant experience in network engineering, with specific expertise in SONiC and data center networking. Candidates must have a strong understanding of network automation tools and scripting languages, particularly Python and Bash. Basic programming knowledge in languages such as C, C\\+\\+, Golang, or Rust is desirable, even if at a light level. Experience with network protocols like OSPF and familiarity with routing and switching concepts are essential. Candidates should also have experience working with YANG and gNMI technologies, especially in L2 support roles, and be able to demonstrate hands\\-on exposure to these tools. Excellent problem\\-solving skills, communication abilities, and the capacity to work independently in a remote setting are crucial for success in this role.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Configure, deploy, and maintain SONiC\\-based network infrastructure in data center environments.
* Implement and automate network configurations using gNMI and YANG protocols, ensuring efficient and reliable operations.
* Develop and maintain scripts in Python and Bash to automate routine network tasks and troubleshooting processes.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to design scalable network architectures aligned with client requirements.
* Monitor network performance, diagnose issues, and implement corrective actions to minimize downtime.
* Assist in the integration of FRR routing protocols, particularly OSPF, to optimize network routing and resilience.
* Participate in network testing, validation, and documentation to ensure compliance with industry standards and best practices.
* Stay updated on emerging networking technologies and recommend improvements to existing infrastructure.
* Provide L2 support and troubleshooting expertise, especially related to YANG and gNMI\\-based configurations.


**Benefits**
 NR Consulting offers a competitive compensation package along with comprehensive benefits that support your professional and personal growth. Employees enjoy flexible remote working arrangements, allowing for a healthy work\\-life balance. We provide opportunities for continuous learning through training programs, certifications, and industry conferences. Our benefits package includes health insurance, paid time off, and performance\\-based incentives. Additionally, you will be part of a forward\\-thinking organization that values innovation, collaboration, and diversity, fostering a positive and engaging work environment.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 NR Consulting is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive workplace. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. title: Staff Software Engineer
description:
TriNet is a leading provider of comprehensive human resources solutions for small to midsize businesses (SMBs). We enhance business productivity by enabling our clients to outsource their HR function to one strategic partner and allowing them to focus on operating and growing their core businesses. Our full\\-service HR solutions include features such as payroll processing, human capital consulting, employment law compliance and employee benefits, including health insurance, retirement plans and workers’ compensation insurance.
   

  

 TriNet has a nationwide presence and an experienced executive team. Our stock is publicly traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol TNET. If you’re passionate about innovation and making an impact on the large SMB market, come join us as we power our clients’ business success with extraordinary HR.
   

  

**Don't meet every single requirement? Studies have shown that many potential applicants discourage themselves from applying to jobs unless they meet every single requirement. TriNet always strives to hire the most qualified candidate for a particular role, ensuring we deliver outstanding results for our small and medium\\-size customers. So, if you're excited about this role but your past experience doesn't align perfectly with every single qualification in the job description, nobody’s perfect – and we encourage you to apply. You may just be the right candidate for this or other roles.**
**A Brief Overview**
 The Staff Software Engineer will architect, innovate and create multi\\-disciplinary technical and functional solutions to complex business problems. This position provides technical leadership to development and design teams and oversees all technical aspects of projects. This candidate must design and implement reusaable services that are highly scalable, secure, performant, and low cost to maintain and operate.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Architect and lead the planning, design and development of new software solutions
* Working closely with Product owners and other stakeholders to understand the requirements and design software solutions to meet the product requirements
* Solves complex and ambitious problems by crafting elegant and impactful solutions and generates concise and effective analysis, reports, and presentation for both internal and external customers.
* Contribute to technical innovations along with defining coding standards
* Mentors and supports other members of the software development team and contributes to the software development best practices

* Performs other duties as assigned
* Complies with all policies and standards


**Education Qualifications**
* Bachelor's Degree Computer Science, Engineering or related field or equivalent experience preferred


**Experience Qualifications**
* Typically, 10\\+ years of hands\\-on object\\-oriented programming in Java or Python, with expertise in developing and managing DevOps SDLC automation.

* Strong knowledge of CI/CD workflows, API programming, and engineering services automation at scale.


**Skills And Abilities**

* Advanced knowledge of CI/CD workflows, engineering tool integrations, cloud\\-native DevOps platforms, and observability/API solutions, for example, Sentry and SwaggerHub.
* Subject matter expertise in source code management, GitHub, Bitbucket, including GitHub Actions, GitHub Copilot for AI, repository migrations, and toolchain consolidation.
* Advanced proficiency in backend database development, including SQL programming, database schema design, implementation, and optimization for applications and automation development.
* Skilled in designing and implementing test automation frameworks and tools, Playwright, BrowserStack, with expertise in unit testing, code coverage analysis, and enforcing quality gates for robust software delivery.
* Demonstrated ability to design scalable, secure, and maintainable software solutions, define best practices, and refine technical roadmaps aligned to strategic objectives.
* Experienced in establishing KPI metric frameworks to measure engineering excellence, optimize workflows, and drive data\\-informed decision\\-making.
* Strong analytical and problem\\-solving skills with a track record of driving results, inspiring teams, and operating effectively within Agile frameworks and practices.


**Travel Requirements**

Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable persons with disabilities to perform the essential functions.

title: Gen AI Staff Engineer
description:
**We Are:** 




 At Synopsys, we drive the innovations that shape the way we live and connect. Our technology is central to the Era of Pervasive Intelligence, from self\\-driving cars to learning machines. We lead in chip design, verification, and IP integration, empowering the creation of high\\-performance silicon chips and software content. Join us to transform the future through continuous technological innovation.
 



  





**You Are** 




 You are a forward\\-thinking AI engineer with a strong foundation in software development and a passion for applying Generative AI and agentic systems to real\\-world enterprise challenges. You thrive in environments where innovation meets scale, and you bring a disciplined approach to building production\\-ready AI solutions.
 



 Your expertise spans LLMs, RAG pipelines, and agentic AI frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, and LlamaIndex. You write clean, modular, and well\\-tested Python code, and you understand what it takes to move from prototype to production—observability, evaluation, and reliability.
 



 You are familiar with Model Context Protocol (MCP) for secure context sharing and Agent\\-to\\-Agent (A2A) for connecting AI services across enterprise systems. You’re motivated by the opportunity to transform business processes across HR, Finance, Legal, and beyond, and you enjoy collaborating with cross\\-functional teams to deliver solutions that matter.
 



  





**What You’ll Be Doing** 



* Architect and develop GenAI, RAG, and agentic AI applications for enterprise functions.
* Design and deploy AI\\-powered copilots and multi\\-step agent workflows using frameworks like LangChain, LangGraph, and LlamaIndex.
* Build ETL pipelines for document ingestion, parsing, and enrichment, enabling enterprise\\-scale knowledge integration.
* Integrate and experiment with LLMs and GenAI platforms (OpenAI, ChatGPT, Claude, Amazon Bedrock, LLaMA) for optimal solution fit.
* Implement MCP\\-based context sharing and A2A integrations to enable seamless interoperability across enterprise applications.
* Develop and maintain robust APIs and microservices for secure and scalable integration.
* Implement CI/CD pipelines and productionization practices for reliable deployments.
* Establish observability and evaluation frameworks (logging, tracing, prompt tracking, quality metrics) to ensure system reliability.
* Write high\\-quality Python code following best practices for maintainability, performance, and testing.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to translate business needs into technical solutions.
* Optionally contribute to UI development using Angular or React for intuitive user experiences.



  





**The Impact You Will Have** 



* Accelerate digital transformation by embedding AI into core processes.
* Enable data\\-driven decisions through AI\\-powered insights and recommendations.
* Reduce manual effort and operational bottlenecks via smart copilots and agentic workflows.
* Promote a culture of innovation by introducing cutting\\-edge GenAI capabilities across the organization.
* Improve efficiency, accuracy, and scalability of enterprise applications supporting HR, Finance, Legal, and more.



  





**What You’ll Need** 



* 5\\+ years of hands\\-on experience in software development with a focus on AI/ML applications.
* Expertise in GenAI, RAG, and agentic AI systems leveraging LLMs (OpenAI, ChatGPT, Claude, Amazon Bedrock, LLaMA).
* Advanced proficiency in Python, with strong coding discipline (modularity, testing, documentation).
* Familiarity with agentic frameworks like LangChain, LangGraph, and LlamaIndex.
* Experience with MCP and A2A integration for enterprise interoperability.
* Experience building ETL/document pipelines, observability, and evaluation frameworks.
* Strong understanding of CI/CD pipelines, cloud platforms, and production deployment.
* Familiarity with microservices, and modern architectural patterns.
* Experience with SQL, NoSQL, and vector databases.
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field.
* UI development experience (Angular or React) is a plus.



  





**Who You Are** 



* Innovative thinker with a passion for solving complex problems using AI.
* Collaborative team player who thrives in cross\\-functional environments.
* Excellent communicator, able to translate technical concepts for diverse audiences.
* Detail\\-oriented, organized, and adept at managing multiple priorities.
* Self\\-motivated, adaptable, and committed to continuous learning and improvement.



  





**The Team You’ll Be a Part Of** 




 You’ll join a dynamic and innovative engineering team at Synopsys, focused on pioneering GenAI, RAG, and agentic AI solutions for internal enterprise functions. The team values collaboration, creativity, and technical excellence, working closely with business stakeholders to deliver transformative AI applications that drive efficiency and business value across departments.
 



  





**Rewards and Benefits:** 




 We offer a comprehensive range of health, wellness, and financial benefits to cater to your needs. Our total rewards include both monetary and non\\-monetary offerings. Your recruiter will provide more details about the salary range and benefits during the hiring process.
